data_freshness.source: portfolio_snapshots row 15 (LTPs marked at 12:17:35); no 12:30 live mark was available, so figures below are based on the 12:17 snapshot.

pnl_detail.buffer_to_limit_x: N/A (book is positive; buffer is full 3% + current gain)

order_book_state.note: Order book remains EMPTY (no OPEN, no PENDING) — same state as 12:00 tick. Zero new BUY submissions since market open (3.5 hours of strategy-layer silence). No SELL, no MODIFY, no new BUY across any filled holding today.

trigger_a_unrealized_below_neg_1_pct.note: CROSSED INTO POSITIVE TERRITORY: -0.14% (11:48) → +0.07% (12:17), a +₹2,084 swing in ~29 minutes. First positive daily mark of the day. Trajectory is decisively moving the WRONG direction for this trigger. Buffer to trigger now ₹10,686; to loss gate ~₹30,706.

trigger_b_strategy_first_sell_or_exit.status: Still zero SELL, zero MODIFY, zero new BUY since 2026-04-22 14:13:33 (yesterday's HINDUNILVR fill). Now 3.5 hours of strategy-layer silence post-open on Day 2. No trim executed despite AUBANK's improved mark providing a natural exit-at-cost opportunity window.

trigger_c_new_buy_despite_deployment_cap.status: No new BUY submissions of any kind. The 70% max_deployed_pct cap is binding against any admission given the current 78.57% deployment.

trigger_d_bfsi_climbs_above_0_37.note: BFSI share exactly flat tick-over-tick at 36.02% of capital. Internal rotation: PNBHOUSING +51 bps and MAHABANK -40 bps offset, AUBANK +28 bps. No new BFSI admissions. Well inside the 37% trigger threshold.

trigger_e_mahabank_below_neg_5_pct.note: MAHABANK WEAKENED 40 bps tick: -3.07% (11:48) → -3.47% (12:17). Partial reversal of the 11:48 recovery. Still 1.53 pp buffer to -5% trigger, but the reversal ITSELF is a monitoring point. Active trajectory across today: -2.15%, -2.98%, -3.10%, -3.73%, -3.68%, -3.07%, -3.47%. Net -1.32 pp day-over-day; no durable trend yet.

trigger_f_strategy_stall_4h.status: Strategy stall is now 3h15m (market open 09:15 IST → 12:30 tick). 45 minutes to the 4-hour hard trigger at 13:15 tick. Per 12:00 plan's explicit directive on this trigger: 'still do NOT add numeric lever, but flag as repeat escalation for explicit attention'. Stays a prompt-layer concern, not a numeric-lever trigger.

trigger_g_power_cluster_above_0_20.note: Power cluster flat at 16.10% of capital / 20.49% of deployed. No new Power admissions. 3.90 pp buffer to the 20% trigger.

trigger_h_new_open_orders.note: No new OPEN orders appeared; ORDER HYGIENE prompt-layer effect cannot be assessed without new order activity.

findings: Daily P&L crossed INTO POSITIVE territory for the first time today: -₹1,401 (11:48) → +₹683 (12:17), a +₹2,084 swing in 29 minutes. Intraday trajectory is decisively constructive: the book has recovered ~₹8,171 from the 09:11 low (-₹7,488). Drivers this window: AUBANK +₹607 (reversed from -₹97 to +₹510), PNBHOUSING +₹867 (now +2.76%), MAHABANK +₹288 (partial retrace of 11:18→11:48 gain).

Strategy-layer silence extended to 3.5 hours post-open with zero decisions (no SELL, no MODIFY, no new BUY). Cumulative inaction since yesterday's 14:13:33 HINDUNILVR fill is ~22 hours of trading-window time. 45 minutes to the 4-hour hard stall trigger — which itself is explicitly specified as a prompt-layer (not numeric-lever) concern.

AUBANK single-name exposure 18.50% of capital — passively BREACHES max_position_pct=0.15 by 3.50 pp. Minimal drift (was 18.48% at 12:00); all mark-to-market. With AUBANK now +0.28% unrealized (crossed from -0.05%), the opportunity window for an at-cost exit widened — but no strategy action observed.

BFSI cluster flat at 36.02% of capital / 45.84% of deployed — zero delta tick-over-tick. Internal composition rotated (PNBHOUSING +51 bps, MAHABANK -40 bps, AUBANK +28 bps) but net unchanged. Inside the 37% trigger threshold by 0.98 pp.
Power cluster flat at 16.10% of capital / 20.49% of deployed. No new admissions. 3.90 pp buffer to the 20% findings-flag threshold.

MAHABANK weakened 40 bps this tick (-3.07% → -3.47%) — partial reversal of the 11:48 recovery. Still 1.53 pp buffer to the -5% SL-tightening trigger but the reversal interrupts the first durable improvement of the day. Net day-over-day trajectory: -2.15% → -3.47%, -1.32 pp deterioration; second-largest mark-to-market drag on the book after NESTLEIND's cost-basis.

Deployed 78.57% of total value — 8.57 pp above the 0.70 max_deployed_pct cap (essentially unchanged from 78.53% at 12:00). The cap remains binding against admissions; no new BUY can be accepted without a prior trim.
Order book state: still clean — zero OPEN, zero PENDING, zero new submissions this session. Consistent with 12:00 observation.
No intraday positions (paper_positions empty) — all exposure remains in CNC holdings; no intraday-leverage exposure.
Overrides state (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70) is correctly reflected in risk_config.yaml and the 11:30 changelog entry is present. No housekeeping gaps this tick.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.70 (posture unchanged since the 11:30 tightening).

Rationale: not a single hard trigger from the 12:00 plan has fired. Trigger (a) is moving the OPPOSITE direction (unrealized is now POSITIVE +0.07%, a ~₹10,686 buffer widening). Trigger (d) BFSI is flat. Trigger (e) MAHABANK is 1.53 pp from threshold. Trigger (g) Power cluster is flat. Trigger (f) strategy stall (3h15m) is near-threshold but is explicitly a non-numeric-lever trigger per its own specification. Adding a tightening here would be pure friction against an improving book with no supporting signal.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT further tighten max_deployed_pct (0.70 → 0.68). Reason: the 8.57 pp binding gap already imposes clear SELL-before-BUY pressure; adding 2 pp more while the book P&L is actually improving is directionally wrong.

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025). Reason: book turned POSITIVE this tick (+₹683). Trigger (a) moved AWAY from firing by ₹2,084. Tightening a loss gate against a gain is unjustifiable.

Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12). Reason: unchanged from prior ticks — AUBANK's 18.50% is grandfathered mark-to-market; a tighter cap cannot retract it and only penalizes hypothetical new sizing the 70% deployed cap already blocks.

Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65). Reason: trigger (d) not fired — BFSI exactly flat at 36.02%. Additionally, no new entries at all this session, so a stricter confidence gate has no real-world sizing target.

Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct (0.02 → 0.015). Reason: MAHABANK's -3.47% worsening is a 40 bp reversal, not a new regime — within noise range of today's 08:11→12:17 mark-to-market volatility. Still 1.53 pp from the -5% trigger. A systemic SL tightening on a single name's intraday drift would pull SLs tighter on every other holding (8 of which are performing) without clear justification.

Did NOT add a numeric response to the 3.5-hour strategy stall. Reason: trigger (f) explicitly forbids it — 'still do NOT add numeric lever, but flag as repeat escalation for explicit attention'. The stall is a behavioral gap; the corrective surface is the ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt-layer additions from 2026-04-22 16:00, whose assessment is strategy's surface not risk_monitor's.
reassessment_triggers_next_tick: (a) Unrealized P&L reverses from +0.07% and breaks below -1.0% of capital (~-₹10,008) → tighten daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. Current buffer: ₹10,691 from trigger. A reversal from positive to sub-(-1%) in 30 min is a ~₹10,700 adverse move — large but not unprecedented given the 09:11 low.

(b) Strategy layer executes its FIRST SELL/EXIT → read the justification. If AUBANK trim (obvious over-sized name, now +0.28% provides graceful exit point), relax max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 (one-way, back to pre-11:30). Never above 0.75.

(c) Strategy admits a NEW BUY despite 0.70 deployment cap (would require a pre-fill SELL OR a boundary-edge case) → verify deployment math; if a 4th BFSI or 4th Power name is the admit, tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65.
(d) BFSI cluster climbs above 0.37 (+0.98 pp from here) via mark OR new BFSI admission → tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Currently 36.02%, flat tick-over-tick.

(e) MAHABANK single-name unrealized breaks below -5% (-₹4,890) → tighten default_sl_pct 0.02 → 0.015. Currently -3.47%, reversed 40 bps this tick but still 1.53 pp buffer. If the 11:48→12:17 weakening extends another 40+ bps on the next tick (i.e., -3.87%+), elevate to priority-watch even before -5% is breached.
(f) Strategy stall reaches 4 hours (13:15 tick) → still no numeric lever; note as repeated audit-line item for Day 3 carryover.
(g) Power cluster crosses 20% of capital (+3.90 pp) via mark OR new Power admission → findings flag only; no numeric lever (no sector-cap parameter in schema).
(h) Any new OPEN BUY that is NOT self-cancelled within 15 min by the strategy's review step → observation of whether ORDER HYGIENE prompt fix is taking effect.

(i) NEW: if the book's +₹683 gain extends above +₹10,000 (+1.0% of capital) while structural breaches (AUBANK 18.5%, deployed 78.57%, BFSI 36.02%) all persist → consider that the strategy's hold-it-all posture has been coincidentally validated by tape-reading luck rather than portfolio construction, and note this as a distinct audit concern — but still do NOT add a numeric lever, since a gain doesn't create a risk vector.
